title: Hearty German-Style Pork Stew
description: A rich and flavorful gluten-free stew made with tender pork and a blend of spices. Perfect for a cozy evening meal.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the pork cubes in batches until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes per batch. Remove the pork from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes to the pot and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the browned pork back to the pot, along with the beef broth, red wine, and German seasoning.
Bring the stew to a boil, then cover the pot and transfer it to the oven.
Bake the stew in a preheated oven at 300°F (150°C) for 2 1/2 hours, or until the pork is tender.
Season the stew with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
